title: vernonia diversifolia subsp. bechioides
intro: Vernonia diversifolia subsp. bechioides, also known as a subspecies of the Vernonia diversifolia plant, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Vernonia diversifolia subsp. bechioides are numerous, including the potential to reduce fever, relieve pain and inflammation, and treat various infections. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infused in hot water to be consumed, or used topically as a poultice or ointment to treat skin conditions.
